87e9a24155537c9a.original_title: Appeals court reinstates $656M judgment against the PLO and Palestinian Authority
87e9a24155537c9a.original_content_preview: A federal appeals court on Monday reinstated a $656 million judgment against the Palestine Liberation Organization and Palestinian Authority for their role in terrorist attacks in Israel more than two decades ago. The ruling by the U.S. Court of Appeals for the D.C. Circuit revives a lawsuit brought by American victims of six attacks between 2001 and 2004 that killed 33 people and wounded more than 450.

933d3473afae27b4.original_title: US and Iran agree to 2-week ceasefire as Trump pulls back on threats
933d3473afae27b4.original_content_preview: President Donald Trump threatened to blow up every bridge and power plant in Iran, action that would be so far-reaching that some experts in military law said it could constitute a war crime. President Donald Trump said late Tuesday he’s pulling back on his threats to launch devastating strikes on Iran As the war in Iran enters its sixth week, residents of Tehran struggle to deal with the strikes in the city that has been heavily targeted.
